title: Selecting IPA file
author: coolguy1239837461
body: Tapping on IPA file does not select the file resulting in me not being able to do anything.

title: Process finishes and installs but app isn't on homescreen
author: zenistrifqq

title: ATV Support
author: joensarah
body: Can support for ATV 4K 2Gen be added?

title: Apps get signed, but crash at opening.
author: biggpopps
body:
Hello,

My apps get signed, but keeps crashing at opening the app. What can be the issue ?

title: error 'Sign failed' if selected ipa have special symbols in name
author: Kyogre
body:
There is error 'Sign failed - Please try other .ipa files' appears if ipa-file has in its name at least one **space** or **parenthesis** ().

App version 0.2.5.

title: Sign failed error
author: SoosKakasiAdam

title: Not possible to select an ipa file.
author: Landxhent
body:
IPhone 12mini 14.1 taurine 1.1.5. 

Upon opening permasigner, no ipa file can be selected for signing. Checked on all versions from 0.1.10 to the  0.2.1.

Several apps have been successfully signed before on 0.1.10, however now it's impossible to sign any ipa. 

Have also tried to clean documents folder - no result.

title: how to uninstall   permasigneriOS's  app
author: PaddyPan520
body:
how to uninstall   the app which installed with permasigneriOS
thx  everyone

title: I use permasignerios and keep reporting errors. The version has been changed and other Debs are still wrong
author: xu33335

title: unc0ver not working
author: guteSeite
body:
unc0ver 8.0.2 stops working at 1/32
IOS 14.6 / SE2020

title: Installation error with newly signed iPA's on 0.1.12
author: theRealVLRS
body: I can sign the iPA's without an issue, but once I try to install the deb file with sileo or filza, I see an error called “Error: Unable to unregister /Applications/X.app”. I'm pretty sure that's related to uicache as I cannot see the app on my homescreen then. In comparison, installing permasigned iPA's which were made on 0.1.10 work as intended. I guess it's something that was introduced in the latest couple of updates that is causing the issue.

title: Flycast signing
author: Landxhent
body: Flycast cannot be signed on iPhone 12mini 14.1 taurine 1.1.6

title: Hope to launch mac and windows
author: luobo180180
body: Hope to launch mac and windows

title: Open in ...
author: D1mar0n
body:
Hello! Please add the ability to open downloaded files directly in PermasigneriOS. Thank you.

![BE88CC44-6CDA-42FA-9CA2-681B863814BD](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/35725771/179424092-cd9a9a6e-fbdb-4c1d-a26b-e331707b4099.png)

Please add the ability to select an .ipa file from any directory.

title: some apps crashes
author: bolognayballs
body: Apps crashing after signing with permsigner in non jail broken state iOS 14.4.2 and iPhone XR uncover

title: 0.1.8 fails to start signing process with v8.0.2 unc0ver
author: Merculous
body:
I had updated to 0.1.8 and I managed to sign another ipa, however now if I try to sign again using the latest release, the button does get clicked but nothing happens. If you spam the button, it says it failed to sign anyway.

My device:  iPhone11,6 14.3, Fugu14 + v8.0.2 unc0ver

title: 0.1.8 has no progress bar
author: baimour
body: 點擊簽名後沒有顯示進度，與之前一樣

title: After installing the plug-in, CLICK Permanent Sign. Why will sign failed appear？
author: longxuli
body: My system is iOS14.1, 12PRO MAX. After installing the plug-in, CLICK Permanent Sign. Why will sign failed appear？

title: Unc0ver users : App signed with permasign will crash if it contains Frameworks folder
author: heinekenpsx
body: Executables in Frameworks will not be signed with the Elucubratus's ldid, it only works with the Procursus's ldid
